ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the customer */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the customer */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "smoker" TEXT /* Smoking status of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region where the customer resides */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer holding the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium amount for the policy */,
  "coverage_amount" REAL /* Maximum coverage amount for the policy */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "co-pay" REAL /* Co-pay amount for the policy */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Renewal status of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy under which the claim is made */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was submitted */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "claim_category" TEXT /* Category of the claim (e.g., accident, illness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_lifestyle" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* How often the customer exercises */,
  "diet" TEXT /* General diet of the customer */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Level of alcohol consumption */,
  "sleep_hours" REAL /* Average hours of sleep per night */,
  "stress_level" TEXT /* Stress level of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_lifestyle_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure reading */,
  "cholesterol_level" REAL /* Cholesterol level */,
  "blood_sugar_level" REAL /* Blood sugar level */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate */,
  "body_fat_percentage" REAL /* Body fat percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy change */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change made to the policy */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_changes_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical claim record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was made */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_history_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative who handled the interaction */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., medical report, invoice) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_documents_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim review */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company representative who reviewed the claim */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was conducted */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the review */,
  "review_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the review */,
  "review_recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations from the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_reviews_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the representative */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the representative (e.g., claims adjuster, customer service) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the representative */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic record */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the analytics are calculated */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of customers in the region */,
  "average_bmi" REAL /* Average BMI of customers in the region */,
  "claim_rate" REAL /* Claim rate in the region */,
  "average_premium" REAL /* Average premium amount in the region */,
  "customer_satisfaction" REAL /* Customer satisfaction rating in the region */,
  "policy_retention_rate" REAL /* Policy retention rate in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES customers ("region")
)
